title: carex caryophyllea f. luxurians
intro: Carex caryophyllea f. luxurians, commonly known as the sedges, is a type of plant in the family Cyperaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve coughs and colds, and reduce inflammation. The bioactive constituents of Carex caryophyllea f. luxurians include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which exhibit therapeutic actions such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
